title: dataset of Delphi consensus on good practices for the use of technology fto support developmental dyslexia
author: Maria Luisa Lorusso
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The dataset reports the answers collected during phase 2 and 3 of the Delphi survey conducted among Italian experts to define good practices for the use of technologies to support children with Developmental Dyslexia.All answers are expressed on a scale from 1 = strongly disagree to 5 = strongly agree.
steps_raw: The dataset reports the answers collected during phase 2 and 3 of the Delphi survey conducted among Italian experts to define good practices for the use of technologies to support children with Developmental Dyslexia.All answers are expressed on a scale from 1 = strongly disagree to 5 = strongly agree.
